description: Frontend monitoring dashboard using metrics collected with Grafana Faro SDK.

targets.expr: probe_success{service_name="App", deployment_environment="$environment"}
sum(process_cpu_utilization{service_name="App", deployment_environment="$environment"})
sum(process_memory_usage{service_name="App", deployment_environment="$environment"})
rate(system_network_io_total{service_name="App", deployment_environment="$environment"}[$__rate_interval])

panels.description:
TTFB is a metric that measures the time between the request for a resource and when the first byte of a response begins to arrive.
https://web.dev/ttfb/

targets.expr: avg_over_time({service_name="App", deployment_environment="$environment"} |= `ttfb` | logfmt | kind = `measurement` | unwrap ttfb [$__range])

panels.title: Time to First Byte (TTFB)

panels.description:
The First Contentful Paint (FCP) metric measures the time from when the page starts loading to when any part of the page's content is rendered on the screen. For this metric, "content" refers to text, images (including background images), <svg> elements, or non-white <canvas> elements.
https://web.dev/fcp/

targets.expr: avg_over_time({deployment_environment="$environment", service_name="App"} |= ` fcp=` | logfmt | kind = `measurement` | unwrap fcp [$__range])

panels.title: First Contentful Paint (FCP)

panels.description:
Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS): measures visual stability. To provide a good user experience, pages should maintain a CLS of 0.1. or less.
https://web.dev/cls/

targets.expr: avg_over_time({deployment_environment="$environment", service_name="App"} |= `cls` | logfmt | kind = `measurement` | unwrap cls [$__range])

panels.title: Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS)

panels.description:
Largest Contentful Paint (LCP): measures loading performance. To provide a good user experience, LCP should occur within 2.5 seconds of when the page first starts loading.
https://web.dev/lcp/

targets.expr: avg_over_time({deployment_environment="$environment", service_name="App"} |= ` lcp=` | logfmt | kind = `measurement` | unwrap lcp [$__range])

panels.title: Largest Contentful Paint (LCP)

panels.description:
First Input Delay (FID): measures interactivity. To provide a good user experience, pages should have a FID of 100 milliseconds or less.
https://web.dev/fid/

targets.expr: avg_over_time({deployment_environment="$environment", service_name="App"} |= `input_delay=` | logfmt | kind = `measurement` | unwrap input_delay [$__range])

panels.title: First Input Delay (FID)

options.content:
# Web Vitals

For Web Vitals help: [https://web.dev/vitals/](https://web.dev/vitals/)

panels.description:
TTFB is a metric that measures the time between the request for a resource and when the first byte of a response begins to arrive.
https://web.dev/ttfb/

targets.expr: quantile_over_time(0.75, {deployment_environment="$environment", service_name="App"} |= ` ttfb=` | logfmt | kind = `measurement` | unwrap ttfb [5m]) by (service_name)
quantile_over_time(0.75, {deployment_environment="$environment",service_name="App"} |= " fcp=" | logfmt | kind="measurement" | unwrap fcp [5m]) by (service_name)
quantile_over_time(0.75, {deployment_environment="$environment",service_name="App"} |= " lcp=" | logfmt | kind="measurement" | unwrap lcp [5m]) by (service_name)

panels.title: Page Load, p75

panels.description:
Cumulative Layout Shift (CLS): measures visual stability. To provide a good user experience, pages should maintain a CLS of 0.1. or less.
https://web.dev/cls/

targets.expr: quantile_over_time(0.75, {deployment_environment="$environment", service_name="App"} |= ` cls=` | logfmt | kind = `measurement` | unwrap cls [5m]) by (service_name)

panels.title: Cumulative Layout Shift, p75

panels.description:
First Input Delay (FID): measures interactivity. To provide a good user experience, pages should have a FID of 100 milliseconds or less.
https://web.dev/fid/

targets.expr: quantile_over_time(0.75, {deployment_environment="$environment", service_name="App"} |= `input_delay=` | logfmt | kind = `measurement` | unwrap input_delay [5m]) by (service_name)

panels.title: First Input Delay, p75

targets.expr: visits_total{deployment_environment="$environment", service_name="App"}
topk(10, count by(browser_name, browser_version) (count_over_time({deployment_environment="$environment", service_name="App"} |= ` ttfb=` | logfmt | kind = `measurement` [$__range])))
sum by(service_name) (count_over_time({deployment_environment="$environment", service_name="App"} | logfmt | kind = `exception` [$__range]))
count_over_time({deployment_environment="$environment", service_name="App"} | logfmt | kind = `exception` [$__interval])
topk(10, count by(value) (count_over_time({deployment_environment="$environment", service_name="App"} | logfmt | kind = `exception` [$__range])))
topk(10, count by(page_url) (count_over_time({deployment_environment="$environment", service_name="App"} | logfmt | kind = `exception` [$__range])))
topk(10, count by(browser_name, browser_version) (count_over_time({deployment_environment="$environment", service_name="App"} | logfmt | kind = `exception` [$__range])))
topk(10, count by(event_name) (count_over_time({deployment_environment="$environment", service_name="App"} | logfmt | kind = `event` [$__range])))
topk(50, count by(browser) (count_over_time({deployment_environment="$environment", service_name="App"} | logfmt | kind = `event` | event_name = `mainspa_mount` [$__range])))

title: App
